creator: rsmith@xs4all.nl
text:
It builds just fine on my machine:

FreeBSD slackbox.xs4all.nl 7.2-RELEASE-p4 FreeBSD 7.2-RELEASE-p4 #0: 
Sun Oct  4 01:31:56 CEST 2009     
rsmith@slackbox.xs4all.nl:/usr/obj/usr/src/sys/QUADSLACK  amd64

Don't have the hardware to test it, though. :-)

Following is the complete build log;
